## Meeting Purpose

[Review progress on Augment Code's content marketing and SEO initiatives, discuss strategy adjustments, and plan next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Newsletter performance is strong, with plans to expand reach and improve content](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Content production is ramping up, with focus shifting to tactical SEO and backlink strategies for high-value keywords](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Video content creation is in progress, with plans to experiment with various formats and YouTube advertising](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Team to prioritize creating comparison/competitive content to target high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)

## Topics

### Newsletter Performance and Strategy

  - [First newsletter sent to 22,000 subscribers with strong open and click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Planning to add 25,000 more subscribers for the next send](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Focus on click-through rates and actual traffic generated rather than open rates](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Team developing a model to determine the business value of subscribers and guide investment decisions](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Content Production and SEO Strategy

  - [20 articles published on guides page, generating 4,000 impressions and 60 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Team tracking progress through Workstream Progress Tracker and Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Shifting focus to tactical SEO for high-value keywords (e.g., "context engineering", "AI coding", "cloud code")](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Planning to create dedicated comparison/competitive content pages to target high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)

### Video Content and YouTube Strategy

  - [AJ focusing on creating explanatory videos](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Plans to experiment with various video formats, including podcast interviews with the founder](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Considering a significant investment ($500k) in YouTube advertising to rapidly test and learn](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Will (external partner) scheduled for video shooting at the end of August](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Generic backlinks deemed less valuable due to Augment Code's existing website authority](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Team to focus on building backlinks to specific, high-value pages targeting competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Considering allocating budget (e.g., $3k-$10k) for backlinks to boost rankings for strategic content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### Website Optimization

  - [Previous tests showed simpler homepage performed better for conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Team open to adding SEO-focused pages (e.g., /competitive, /guides) without cluttering main navigation](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Plans to review and optimize website for sign-up conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Expand newsletter subscriber base and send improved content to 50,000 subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Create comparison/competitive content pages targeting high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Develop a tactical backlink strategy for high-value pages and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Continue ramping up content production with a focus on SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Proceed with video content creation and explore YouTube advertising opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Jason to start a thread regarding overall video content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [George to provide an update on the progress of video content creation](https://fathom.video/share/H-Dn8xsa4cQwrHbf1EQFbyyVKQpAtRau?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
